allow: Bash(node -e "try { const h = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/tmp/remote-history.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('VALID JSON. series points:', h.series.length, 'first:', h.series[0]?.as_of, 'last:', h.series[h.series.length-1]?.as_of\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('CORRUPT:', e.message\); }")
